name: Pane
description: Pane - Terminal-first AI code assistant manager with Windows support

scripts.daemon:headless: pnpm run build:main && pnpm exec electron ./main/dist/main/src/daemon/headless.js
scripts.electron-dev: pnpm run build:main && concurrently "pnpm run --filter main dev" "pnpm run --filter frontend dev" "wait-on http-get://localhost:${VITE_PORT:-${PORT:-4521}} && electron ."
scripts.build: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:electron
scripts.build:mac: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --publish never && node scripts/verify-mac-universal-binaries.js
scripts.build:mac:universal: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --universal --publish never && node scripts/verify-mac-universal-binaries.js
scripts.build:mac:x64: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.build:mac:arm64: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.build:linux: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.build:linux:x64: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && electron-builder --linux --x64 --publish never
scripts.build:linux:arm64: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && electron-builder --linux --arm64 --publish never
scripts.build:linux:ci: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.build:mac:ci: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --publish never && node scripts/verify-mac-universal-binaries.js
scripts.test:runpane-contract: pnpm run check:runpane-contract && pnpm --filter runpane build && node scripts/test-runpane-contract.js
scripts.release:mac: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --publish always && node scripts/verify-mac-universal-binaries.js
scripts.release:mac:universal: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --universal --publish always && node scripts/verify-mac-universal-binaries.js
scripts.release:linux: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && pnpm run generate-notices && electron-builder --linux --publish always
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm run electron:rebuild && pnpm run build:main

entry.Name: Pane
entry.Comment: Claude Code Commander for managing multiple Claude Code instances
